# AG-Visio / myconf
> Self-hosted video conferencing with AI voice agent. Built on LiveKit, Turborepo, FastMCP 3.2.

## Key files
- README.md: Project overview and quick start
- CHANGELOG.md: Version history (v2.3.0 latest)
- AGENTS.md: Agent instructions and conventions
- tests/conftest.py: Shared test fixtures
- justfile: Command runner (lint, test, install, deploy commands)
- pyproject.toml: Python config (fastmcp 3.2, ruff, coverage)
- livekit.yaml: LiveKit server with 2026 features (OTel, TURN, auto-restart)

## Architecture
- apps/web/ — Next.js 16 dashboard (port 10886)
- apps/agent/ — LiveKit voice pipeline (Silero→Whisper→Ollama→Piper)
- packages/conferencing_mcp/ — 25 MCP tools (conferencing, rooms, diagnostics, intelligence, signaling)
- packages/remoting_mcp/ — 8 MCP tools (screen capture, mouse/keyboard, screen share)

## Conventions
- Python 3.12+, Ruff lint 120-char, double quotes
- FastMCP 3.2: Annotated[Field(...)] params, ## Return Format, ## Examples
- 68 pytest tests, 27 vitest, 22 Playwright E2E
- Ports: Web 10886, Conferencing MCP 10720, Remoting MCP 10725, Agent 10887

## Docs
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md — Service map, Docker stack, data flows
- docs/FEATURES.md — Full feature list (18 sections)
- docs/INSTALL.md — Installation guide
- docs/USAGE.md — Usage guide
- docs/LIVEKIT.md — LiveKit configuration (2026 edition)
